prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MILITRUCKCARRIER-GRN-KP Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Products Kids Toy Truck Army Military Transporter Diecast Car Carrier Playset Description: The Kids Toy Truck Army Military Transporter Diecast Car Carrier Playset is a fun gift to give any little one who loves cars and trucks. With a military army theme, great design and portability, and is completely battery or charge-free, lots of fun and inspiring playtime for your kids and their friends await.
This kids toy truck military diecast car carrier playset features some great design features that will keep your kids busy:

- a clear plastic lid that neatly displays and organizes the cars; simply lift the lid to shift the carriage and easily snaps closed so the cars stay in place and won't get lost

- the large toy truck carrier also has wheels of its own so your little one can play with it too if he or she gets bored of the smaller diecast vehicles

- built-in retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to take with you on family vacations, road trips, excursions to the park or friends houses and much more

- the army military toy truck car transporter is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling or out at playdates

In addition to it's great design, the military army themed toy truck does not require any batteries or charging, so limited playtime for your kids and their friends will never be an issue. Playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use his or her imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills, and learn to share with their playmates too.

PLAYSET INCLUDES: The kids toy truck military transporter playset includes five military cars, one military helicopter, roadblock accessories and large toy truck car carrier with built-in carrying handle Search Terms: (none) Features: - ARMY MILITARY SEMI TRUCK TOY: This awesome semi truck toy comes with 6 military diecast vehicles, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy! The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime - COOL BUILT IN DIECAST CAR SLIDE: The front of the military army semi truck toy features a cool built in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down slide and watch it shoot out the front of the toy truck to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of fun, racing cars and driving the large semi truck toy; this vehicle playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their gross and fine motor skills playing with cars and semi truck toy - GREAT TOY TRUCK FOR TRAVEL: The army military kids semi truck toy is constructed of heavy duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear; the plastic side snap closure and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel - SPECIFICATIONS: Age Group: 3+; Weight: 1.15 pounds; Material: plastic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Military Army Toy Truck Car Carrier
